message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam lifelineStrategy solid
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam noteStyle rectangle
skinparam linetype ortho

participant "FragmentVideoChat" as FragmentVideoChat
participant "LicodeConnector" as LicodeConnector
participant "PeerConnectionFactory" as PeerConnectionFactory
participant "RoomObserver" as RoomObserver
participant "MediaStream" as MediaStream
participant "PeerConnection" as PeerConnection
participant "StreamDescription" as StreamDescription
participant "LicodeSdpObserver" as LicodeSdpObserver
participant "LicodeServer" as LicodeServer
participant "SocketIOClient" as SocketIOClient

== Init ==
FragmentVideoChat -> LicodeConnector: configureConnector
LicodeConnector -> FragmentVideoChat: init
FragmentVideoChat -> PeerConnectionFactory: initializeAndroidGlobals
FragmentVideoChat -> LicodeConnector: addObserverer(RoomObserver)

== Publish ==
FragmentVideoChat -> FragmentVideoChat: startCastView.onClick
FragmentVideoChat -> LicodeConnector: requestPublish
LicodeConnector -> LicodeConnector: triggerPublishAllowed
LicodeConnector -> FragmentVideoChat: onPublishAllowed
FragmentVideoChat -> RoomObserver: startPublish
RoomObserver -> FragmentVideoChat: makeVideoView
FragmentVideoChat -> FragmentVideoChat: publishVideoStreamsView
FragmentVideoChat -> LicodeConnector: doPublish

== Publish-create media ==
LicodeConnector -> PeerConnectionFactory: createLocalMediaStream
PeerConnectionFactory -> LicodeConnector: createMediaConstraints
LicodeConnector -> PeerConnectionFactory: getVideoCapturer
PeerConnectionFactory -> LicodeConnector: createVideoSource(VideoCapturer, MediaConstraints)
LicodeConnector -> MediaStream: createVideoTrack(String, VideoSource)
MediaStream -> LicodeConnector: addTrack
LicodeConnector -> PeerConnectionFactory: createAudioSource(MediaConstraints)
PeerConnectionFactory -> LicodeConnector: createAudioTrack(String, AudioSource)
LicodeConnector -> MediaStream: addTrack

== Publish-create offer ==
LicodeConnector -> LicodeConnector: makePcConstraints
LicodeConnector -> LicodeConnector: create MyPcObserver
LicodeConnector -> PeerConnectionFactory: createPeerConnection(List<IceServer>, MediaConstraints, Observer)
LicodeConnector -> MediaStream: addStream(MediaStream, MediaConstraints)
LicodeConnector -> PeerConnection: setMedia
LicodeConnector -> PeerConnection: attachRenderer
LicodeConnector -> PeerConnection: initLocal(PeerConnection, SdpObserver)
PeerConnection -> LicodeSdpObserver: createOffer
LicodeSdpObserver -> LicodeConnector: onCreateSuccess
LicodeConnector -> PeerConnection: setLocalDescription
PeerConnection -> LicodeSdpObserver: onSetSuccess
LicodeSdpObserver -> LicodeServer: sendLocalDescription
LicodeServer -> LicodeSdpObserver: sendSDPSocket("publish")
LicodeSdpObserver -> LicodeServer: publish
LicodeServer -> LicodeSdpObserver: publish success
LicodeServer -> LicodeConnector: setRemoteDescription

== Subscribe ==
== Subscribe-token ==
FragmentVideoChat -> FragmentVideoChat: startVideoChat
FragmentVideoChat -> LicodeConnector: createToken
LicodeConnector -> LicodeServer: http\nLoad Balance
LicodeServer -> FragmentVideoChat: createToken success
FragmentVideoChat -> LicodeConnector: connect
LicodeConnector -> LicodeConnector: createToken
LicodeConnector -> LicodeConnector: decodeToken
LicodeConnector -> SocketIOClient: connect to server\nsocket
SocketIOClient -> LicodeConnector: onConnectCompleted

== Subscribe-listen socket events ==
FragmentVideoChat -> FragmentVideoChat: listen events\nonAddStream\nonSubscribeP2P\nonPublishP2P\nonDataStream\nonRemoveStream\ndisconnect
FragmentVideoChat -> SocketIOClient: sendMessageSocket("token")
SocketIOClient -> FragmentVideoChat: token success
FragmentVideoChat -> RoomObserver: onRoomConnected
RoomObserver -> FragmentVideoChat: setBandwidthLimits

alt [has streams]
    RoomObserver -> FragmentVideoChat: triggerStreamAdded
    FragmentVideoChat -> FragmentVideoChat: mOnAddStream
    FragmentVideoChat -> FragmentVideoChat: triggerStreamAdded
end

FragmentVideoChat -> LicodeConnector: onStreamAdded
FragmentVideoChat -> LicodeConnector: subscribe
LicodeConnector -> LicodeConnector: doSubscribe
LicodeConnector -> FragmentVideoChat: triggerMediaAvailable
FragmentVideoChat -> FragmentVideoChat: onStreamMediaAvailable
FragmentVideoChat -> FragmentVideoChat: makeVideoView
FragmentVideoChat -> PeerConnection: attachRenderer
PeerConnection -> PeerConnection: create MyPcObserver
PeerConnection -> PeerConnectionFactory: createPeerConnection
PeerConnectionFactory -> PeerConnection: initRemote(PeerConnection, SdpObserver)
PeerConnection -> LicodeSdpObserver: createOffer
LicodeSdpObserver -> LicodeConnector: onCreateSuccess
LicodeConnector -> PeerConnection: setLocalDescription
PeerConnection -> LicodeSdpObserver: onSetSuccess
LicodeSdpObserver -> LicodeServer: sendLocalDescription
LicodeServer -> LicodeSdpObserver: sendSDPSocket("subscribe")
LicodeSdpObserver -> LicodeServer: subscribe success
LicodeServer -> LicodeConnector: setRemoteDescription

@enduml
```
